1→"""Time operations abstraction for testing. 2→ 3→This module provides an ABC for time operations (sleep, now) to enable 4→fast tests that don't actually sleep and can use deterministic timestamps. 5→""" 6→ 7→from abc import ABC, abstractmethod 8→from datetime import datetime 9→ 10→ 11→class Time(ABC): 12→ """Abstract time operations for dependency injection.""" 13→ 14→ @abstractmethod 15→ def sleep(self, seconds: float) -> None: 16→ """Sleep for specified number of seconds. 17→ 18→ Args: 19→ seconds: Number of seconds to sleep 20→ """ 21→ ... 22→ 23→ @abstractmethod 24→ def now(self) -> datetime: 25→ """Get the current datetime. 26→ 27→ Returns: 28→ Current datetime (timezone-naive for simplicity) 29→ """ 30→ ...

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
## Summary
**PR #8835**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8835
### Changes Made
1. **Removed git-repo guard from HttpClient creation** (`src/erk/core/context.py:594-599`) - HttpClient now initializes whenever a GitHub token is available, regardless of whether the user is in a git repository
2. **Added `put` method to HttpClient gateway** (3 files) - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/http/abc.py` — abstract method - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/http/real.py` — httpx implementation - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/http/fake.py` — test fake
3. **Created RemoteGitHub gateway** (3-file simplified pattern) - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/abc.py` — ABC with 9 methods (auth, branch creation, file commits, PR management, workflow dispatch, comments) - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py` — Production implementation using HttpClient directly (no subprocess/gh CLI) - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/fake.py` — Constructor-injected responses with mutation tracking
4. **Added `--repo` flag to `erk one-shot`** (`src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py`) - `--repo owner/repo` enables dispatching without a local git clone - Validates format, rejects incompatible flags (`--ref-current`) - Routes to new `dispatch_one_shot_remote` function
5. **Created remote dispatch function** (`src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py`) - Mirrors the local dispatch flow but uses RemoteGitHub gateway instead of git/GitHub gateways - All operations via REST API (branch creation, file commits, PR creation, workflow dispatch)
6. **Tests** — 19 new tests across 2 files - 12 tests for `FakeRemoteGitHub` mutation tracking and read returns - 7 tests for remote dispatch logic (happy path, dry-run, model, ref, plan-only, CLI validation)
